title: Golden-signal telemetry the mesh emits for free
description: Explains the request-level metrics (latency, traffic, errors, saturation) the proxies emit and how to use them without app instrumentation.
body: Use when you need service-level visibility from the mesh. Do not re-instrument the app for metrics the proxy already provides. Actions: know each sidecar emits standard request metrics (request count, duration histograms, response codes) labeled by source/destination workload and response flags, enabling RED/golden-signal dashboards and SLOs without code changes; use response flags to distinguish upstream failures from proxy-level rejections. Validation signals include per-route latency/error metrics appearing and response-flag labels explaining failures. Risk boundary: high-cardinality custom labels on mesh metrics can blow up storage and warrant care.
